summary: Rewrote ARCHITECTURE.md (389 lines, clean): removed all stale CR content from lines 191-252, added all 35 source files to directory tree, documented all missing modules (embed.js, vad.js, profiler.js, latency-log.js, store/index.js, adapters/, cli/, tunnel.js, cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), fixed default port to 1234, added voice latency budget section, added known issues section. Created .team/codebase-map.md with full file tree, module dependencies, key interfaces, and known issues table.
